title: TinkerHand – robo.innovate Hackathon
summary: Built robotic assistant with speech2text pipeline that selects ACT policies through keyword recognition.

title: G.H.O.S.T. – Tendon-Driven Robotic Hand
summary: DIY robotic hand actuated with nylon tendons made < 200$. Wireless control via flex sensor glove.

title: Generative Classifiers as Trustworthy Alternative in Tactile Classification
summary: Explored invertible neural networks and generative classifiers for robust tactile material classification. Was a part of [CIT433027] Advanced Deep Learning for Robotics.

title: Neural Networks Control Video
summary: 3blue1brown style video about neural networks and their employment in robotic control for [MW2388] Applied Biorobotics.

title: Robotic Arm – HackaHealth ETH Zürich
summary: Developed adaptive robotic arm prototype for quadriplegic patient with 3 funded design iterations.
